step.title: Load architecture and NFR requirements
step.action: Load architecture document and extract system components and quality attributes.
Load NFR requirements and map them to architectural components.

step.title: Categorize NFRs
step.action: Categorize NFRs into: performance, reliability, scalability, security, usability.
Identify any NFRs that span multiple categories.

step.title: Define measurable test criteria
step.action: For each category, define specific measurable test criteria.
Ensure criteria are quantifiable with clear units and thresholds.

step.title: Select testing tools and approaches
step.action: Select testing tools and approaches per category with rationale.
Consider open-source vs commercial options and team capability.

step.title: Define pass/fail thresholds
step.action: Define pass/fail thresholds aligned with business requirements.
Include degradation thresholds for early warning detection.

step.title: Produce NFR assessment report
step.template-output: Apply the template from template.md, filling all sections with NFR assessment details.
